title_en: Gemini Robotics expands world-model ideas into embodied reasoning
title_zh: Gemini Robotics 把世界模型思路扩展到具身推理
description_en: Google DeepMind extends Gemini into embodied reasoning and robot action with Gemini Robotics and Gemini Robotics-ER.
description_zh: Google DeepMind 通过 Gemini Robotics 与 Gemini Robotics-ER 把 Gemini 扩展到具身推理与机器人动作。
why_it_matters: It reframes physical agents as world-understanding and planning systems, not just action policies.
